emails.subject: Jan 30 IBM meeting
emails.body: Jan 30 IBM meeting Jeff- Sue- On January 30 an EES team is meeting with IBM in San Jose to cover a number f issues, related top the IBM contract. It would be very helpful to the team if one of you could attend the meeting and present Enrons perspective on the California situation Could you call Jeff Nieland 713 345 9352) to let us know if you could participate. We can fill you in on the details re: IBM over the phone. chris

emails.subject: Jan 30 IBM meeting

emails.subject: Re: Jan 30 IBM meeting
emails.body: Re: Jan 30 IBM meeting Greetings Chris and Jeff: I'd love to, but unfortunately I'll be in New York from Sunday through Tuesday. Sue, can you handle? Best, Jeff Chris Holmes@EES 01/23/2001 04:07 PM
